MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAIGE, RICHARD COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEPT.#1, JUDGE LILLIAN SING. DISMISSED FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION. NEITHER PARTY APPEARED AT TRIAL.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAIGE, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, MICHAEL DBA DIVA'S ONLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 506 HAYES $4,920.00 RENT, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,170.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
